close_reason: Added put_parent_missing and put_permission_denied (unix) failure mode tests
description: tests cover happy path + dotdot + missing file + mode 0600. Missing: (1) put() to a path whose parent does not exist (Backend error path); (2) get() on a path that is a directory (ErrorKind::IsADirectory mapping); (3) get() on a path with no read permission (PermissionDenied → Backend); (4) concurrent put() calls to the same path from one process (counter dedup); (5) rename failure (cross-device tempfile would not happen here, but a mocked failing path could verify cleanup). Each of these is a future bug-class waiting to regress when someone refactors write_secret_file.
title: No tests for failure modes: rename failure, IsADirectory, PermissionDenied, parent missing, concurrent put
